```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Test subprocess execution and process management"
---
# Subprocess Tests
## Task
Write tests for subprocess execution and process management.
## Requirements
1. Test subprocess startup, communication, and termination.
2. Test stdout/stderr capture and parsing.
3. Test timeout handling for long-running processes.
4. Test return code validation.
5. Test environment variable passing to subprocesses.
## Constraints
- Set timeouts on all subprocess calls. Mock subprocess when testing business logic.
## Success Criteria
- Process lifecycle tested. Output captured correctly. Timeouts enforced.
```
